sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102913" key="telamwni/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τελᾰμων-ίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τελαμών</foreign> (<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2</biblScope> </bibl>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:28:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.28.3</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
